expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and ties it to Phase 6 requirements: "Case focus: **Final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording**" and details layering + executable wording expectations: "Required layering model (rubric)..." and "Required “executable wording” implication... validate_executable_steps". It also marks: "Phase focus explicitly covered: PASS".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly scoped to Phase 6 and enumerates Phase 6 contract artifacts/validators: "Primary phase under test: **Phase 6**" and "Phase 6 contract alignment (what Phase 6 must do)" plus "Required Phase 6 outputs (contract)... phase6_spawn_manifest.json... drafts/qa_plan_phase6_r<round>.md... context/quality_delta_<feature-id>.md". It also notes missing Phase 6 runtime artifacts but the produced evaluation content itself aligns to Phase 6.
